name: Decouple state management from UI
description: MEDIUM: the Provider should be the only place that knows how state is stored/synced; UI reads the generic context interface.

metadata.intent: Keep UI components independent from the underlying state implementation

must_use: UI depends only on the context contract
must_not: UI components calling global store hooks directly when they are intended to be reusable
conventions: Swap providers (local vs global vs server-synced) without changing UI subcomponents.

steps.description: Search for UI components that directly call state hooks that make them non-reusable.
Create a provider that owns the state hook + sync logic, and pass only `{ state, actions, meta }` to context.
